keyEvents.text: Goal!  Montserrat 1, Barbados 0. Brandon Barzey (Montserrat) right footed shot from outside the box to the bottom left corner. Assisted by Dominic Richmond.
Goal!  Montserrat 2, Barbados 0. Josiah Dyer (Montserrat) right footed shot from very close range to the high centre of the goal. Assisted by Jamie Allen.
Alex Dyer (Montserrat) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Mario Williams (Barbados) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Substitution, Barbados. Zeco Edmee replaces Keon Atkins.
